raw.title: There Is No ‘Hard Problem Of Consciousness’
raw.excerpt: The post There Is No ‘Hard Problem Of Consciousness’ appeared first on NOEMA.

llm_processed.summary: Carlo Rovelli argues that consciousness is not separate from the physical world, and that this idea is not new, but rather a natural consequence of scientific discoveries.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Enable a deeper understanding of the relationship between mind and matter, opening up new possibilities for innovation and discovery.
